log: === INITIATIVE ===

→ AoE hits 1 target(s)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: FAIL
→ Young Red Dragon gains: charmed_hp, incapacitated
=== ROUND 2 ===
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.

→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 10 damage.
→ Young Red Dragon takes damage — Hypnotic Pattern charm breaks!

→ 4 damage.
→ Young Red Dragon gains: vm_disadvantage
Halfling — Unarmored Caster casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Halfling — Unarmored Caster for 6. HP: 49/67
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 15] MISS!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 15] HIT! 17 damage. Halfling — Unarmored Caster HP: 32/67

--- Halfling — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
Halfling — Unarmored Caster casts Greater Invisibility (4th level)
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 15] HIT! 20 damage. Halfling — Unarmored Caster HP: 0/67
